text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following her day off, Nishino Flower and I are
having a meeting together.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Ah! S-sorry! Did I just nod off?!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Um... I really am sorry... I got woken up by a bad
dream last night and couldn't get back to sleep...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Nishino Flower didn't get much rest at all
on account of her nightmare.
